name: Gingered Beef Stir-Fry
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Boneless beef sirloin steak - cut into 1/8-inch slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the beef diagonally across grain into 1/8-inch slices.
2. Heat oil in a wok or medium skillet over medium-high heat.
3. Add beef and seasonings; stir-fry until browned.
4. Add vegetables and stir-fry until tender crisp.
5. Blend ginger, cornstarch, soy sauce, and 1 tablespoon water in a small bowl.
6. Add the mixture to the beef and cook, stirring, until thickened.
7. Serve over rice.
Microwave Oven Instructions
===========================
1. Cut the beef diagonally across grain into 1/8-inch slices.
2. Combine beef, salt, pepper, and oil in a 1-quart baking dish. Cover with waxed paper.
3. Cook on HIGH (maximum power) for 1 minute. Stir and cook an additional 1 to 2 minutes on HIGH.
4. Remove beef and set aside.
5. Add vegetables and cook on HIGH for 2 to 3 minutes or until tender crisp.
6. Blend ginger, cornstarch, soy sauce, and 1 teaspoon water in a small bowl.
7. Add the mixture to the vegetables; cover and cook on HIGH power for 1 minute. Stir and cook 1 minute longer.
8. Let stand 2 minutes. Serve over rice.
